caption: The video features a man playing an acoustic guitar and singing into a microphone. He is wearing glasses, a white shirt, and a black vest adorned with intricate blue beadwork and a red and black design on the front. The setting appears to be indoors, with wooden blinds visible in the background, suggesting a cozy or intimate venue. The man is focused on his performance, strumming the guitar and singing passionately. The audience is partially visible in the foreground, indicating that this is a live performance. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner of the screen, possibly indicating the name of the event or organization hosting the performance.
